% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

% SZS output start Proof for basketball_negative

3. ! [X0] : (can_jump_shot(X0) => leaps_straight_into_air(X0)) [input(axiom)]

6. ~(~leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) => (professional_basketball_player(yuri) & american_national(yuri))) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~~(~leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) => (professional_basketball_player(yuri) & american_national(yuri))) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ~leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) => (professional_basketball_player(yuri) & american_national(yuri)) [flattening 7]
9. ! [X0] : (can_jump_shot(X0) | ~professional_basketball_player(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
10. ! [X0] : (leaps_straight_into_air(X0) | ~can_jump_shot(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
11. ! [X0] : (activates_leg_muscles(X0) | ~leaps_straight_into_air(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
12. (professional_basketball_player(yuri) & american_national(yuri)) | leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) [ennf transformation 8]
17. ~professional_basketball_player(X0) | can_jump_shot(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
18. ~can_jump_shot(X0) | leaps_straight_into_air(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
19. ~leaps_straight_into_air(X0) | activates_leg_muscles(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
20. ~activates_leg_muscles(yuri) [cnf transformation 5]
22. professional_basketball_player(yuri) | leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) [cnf transformation 12]
24. 1 <=> leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) [avatar definition]
26. leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) <- (1) [avatar component clause 24]
33. 3 <=> professional_basketball_player(yuri) [avatar definition]
35. professional_basketball_player(yuri) <- (3) [avatar component clause 33]
36. 1 | 3 [avatar split clause 22,33,24]
37. can_jump_shot(yuri) <- (3) [resolution 17,35]
39. leaps_straight_into_air(yuri) <- (3) [resolution 18,37]
40. 1 | ~3 [avatar split clause 39,33,24]
41. activates_leg_muscles(yuri) <- (1) [resolution 19,26]
42. $false <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 41,20]
43. ~1 [avatar contradiction clause 42]
s2. 1 | 3 [sat_conversion 36]
s3. ~3 | 1 [sat_conversion 40]
s4. ~1 [sat_conversion 43]
s5. ~3 [rat s3,s4]
s6. # [rat s2,s5,s4]
44. $false [avatar sat refutation s6]
